---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for TermDeck
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: jhizzard
---

## What problem does this solve?

What are you trying to do, and why is the current TermDeck experience frustrating? Be specific about the workflow.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Mockups or sketches help if it's a UI change.

## Alternatives considered

What else you tried, or how you currently work around this.

## Scope check

Does your idea fit TermDeck's scope?

- [ ] It's a desktop tool, not a remote/multi-user service
- [ ] It doesn't require a build step on the client
- [ ] It doesn't require a major new dependency
- [ ] It doesn't change the WebSocket protocol in a breaking way

If any of the above are unchecked, please open the issue anyway but note that the change may be deferred or declined.

## Additional context

Links to similar tools, your specific use case, anything else.
